description_for_human: Luxury vacation rentals in Palermo, Sicily. Direct booking with concierge services.
description_for_model: Le Sicilien manages 5 luxury vacation rental properties in Palermo, Sicily: 3 in the historic centre (Moncada de Luna from €95/night, Eleonora D'Aragona from €110/night, Fior di Sicilia from €85/night) and 2 near the beach (Villa Harmony Relax in Mondello from €120/night, Tilde Sunset Bay seafront from €320/night). All include 24/7 concierge, fibre Wi-Fi, AC, and fully-equipped kitchens. Premium add-ons: private chef, yacht charter, airport transfers. Direct bookings save up to 15% vs OTAs. Rating: 4.9/5 (200+ reviews). Contact: +39 327 375 1480 or lesicilienhouses@gmail.com.
